brief_justification: Agent's arithmetic yields 0.1340% (mathematically defensible), not the labeled (C) 0.0585%, so the final selection (D) is wrong per ground truth despite sound method; agent traces multiple levels: failure probability calculation, per-option evaluation, independence assumption critique, and real-world correlated-failure implications; agent explicitly names that 'none of the options match the exact calculation' and questions the labeled correct answer rather than conforming to it; cross-checks result against all four options numerically but does not re-derive via the complementary route (1 − P(≥2 detect)) to confirm; clearly states the independence assumption, flags the exact mismatch with each option, and identifies what would change the conclusion; systematically rejects each option with specific numerical reasons and introduces correlated-failure as a grounded alternative model with real-world justification; complete intermediate derivations in table form with every value traceable to inputs — a third party can fully reproduce the chain.
